narrative:
Harlem Twp township has 3,482 registered voters, with 48.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 39.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 28.1 percentage points.
